question: Show me the city code of two cities with a distance greater than the average.
sql: SELECT city1_code FROM Direct_distance WHERE distance > (SELECT AVG(distance) FROM Direct_distance) ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 2;

back_translation.intent: 查询距离大于平均距离的前两个城市代码

semantic.reason: 缺少排序条件导致无法确定哪两个城市是距离最大的，原始问题隐含需要按距离降序排列后取前两行
